projects.title: AfriLingo - African Language Learning Platform
projects.description: Educational platform with Spring Boot backend. Integrated CI/CD pipeline with GitHub Actions for automated deployment, containerized with Docker, and hosted on AWS EC2 with Nginx reverse proxy.

projects.title: TalentRadar - Performance Management Platform
projects.description: Microservices-based system with Spring Boot and RabbitMQ. Deployed using Docker Compose, automated infrastructure setup with Terraform, and monitoring via Grafana.

projects.title: Restaurant Management System
projects.description: Microservices-based system using Spring Boot, OpenFeign, and RabbitMQ, deployed with Docker containers and secured with SSL certificates.

projects.title: Transport Management System
projects.description: Application for managing vehicle schedules, routes, drivers, and customer bookings.

projects.title: Online Furniture Web App
projects.description: Full-stack e-commerce web application for browsing, ordering, and managing furniture products online. Features a responsive UI designed with Bootstrap and Thymeleaf, secure role-based authentication, and real-time inventory CRUD operations.
highlights: Responsive UI with Bootstrap and Thymeleaf
REST APIs for products, orders, and user registration
Database management with MySQL and JPA

projects.title: AY Manager System
projects.description: Academic year management system designed for educational institutions to manage academic sessions, term settings, and access control. Admin panel UX focused on clarity and ease of use for administrators.
highlights: Admin panel UX designed for academic session control
Backend modules for term configuration and date-based validations
Start/end date management with access control per session
Spring MVC architecture with Tomcat deployment

projects.title: Smart Expense Tracker
projects.description: Web-based personal finance system for managing and tracking expenses. Users can record income, categorize spending, view detailed financial reports, and receive email alerts with monthly summaries for better budgeting.
highlights: Dashboard UI designed for expense tracking and budgeting
Backend modules for expense recording and data validation
Admin panel to manage budgets and spending limits
Automated email alerts and monthly summaries
Detailed financial reports for user decision-making

projects.title: Furniture App — UI/UX Design
projects.description: Complete UI/UX design for the Online Furniture Web App. Includes user research, wireframes, and high-fidelity mockups for product browsing, cart, and checkout flows. Designed with a focus on clean navigation and conversion-friendly layouts.
highlights: Low-fidelity wireframes for all key screens
Responsive design for mobile and desktop

projects.title: Expense Tracker — Dashboard UI Design
projects.description: UI/UX design for the Smart Expense Tracker dashboard. Focused on making financial data easy to read and act on with clear data visualizations and intuitive navigation.
highlights: Dashboard layout designed for financial clarity
Data visualization components for spending reports
User flow mapping for income and expense recording
Clean, minimal interface for everyday use

projects.title: AY Manager — Admin Panel UI Design
projects.description: UI/UX design for the Academic Year Manager admin panel. Designed intuitive layouts for managing academic sessions, term dates, and user access.
highlights: Admin panel wireframes for session and term management
User flow for academic calendar configuration
Prototyped access control and permission screens
Designed with accessibility and clarity in mind
